description: Edge case: cold-storage policy — anything not recalled in the last 180 days gets archived (not forgotten). Demonstrates the no_recall_in_days policy lever combined with action=archive.
notes: no_recall_in_days requires the backend to track last-recalled-at per memory. Backends that do not (capability "recall_tracking" absent) MUST return an error rather than silently skipping the policy — see Editor's note in docs/spec/v0.md §3.5. action=archive moves rows to cold storage; they no longer surface in recall but are not deleted.
